description: Style Notecatwalk sandals for the boho lover in you. These shoes make for great grounding to warm weather looks. Earthy tones look best with Indian ethnic fusion wear. Wear this with an edgy kurta from AND, a rugged leather belt, skinny jeans and street jewellry.Product DetailsGrey beaded thong style strap with mirror work, has a synthetic separatorElasticated back strap and beige footbedTPU outsole with branded grooves at the forefoot and a floral lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
